mapper.select: SELECT stockCode, stockName, currentPrice, changeRate, volume, tradingValue FROM ( SELECT stock_code AS stockCode, stock_name AS stockName, current_price AS currentPrice, change_rate AS changeRate, volume, trading_value AS tradingValue FROM stock_realtime_current ORDER BY current_price DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 10

SELECT s.stock_code AS stockCode, s.stock_name AS stockName, s.current_price AS currentPrice, s.change_rate AS changeRate, s.volume, s.trading_value AS tradingValue FROM watchlist w JOIN stock_realtime_current s ON w.stock_code = s.stock_code WHERE w.user_no = #{userNo} ORDER BY w.created_at DESC
